channel.title: GrantOtter — Federal Funding Updates
channel.description: Aggregated weekly feed of grant opportunities and agency news from NIH, NSF, and DARPA.

item.title: NGMM Shopping Notice
item.description: The NGMM program will be actively reviewing the ERIS Marketplace for innovative, post-competitive, awardable solutions that exercise the early-stage version of the NGMM 3D Assembly Design Kit (3D-ADK). | See Program

item.title: Notice of Informational Webinar: Advancing Biomedical Careers: Strategies for Successful F and K Awards NIAID Virtual Outreach activity May 6th and 7th, 2026
item.description: Notice NOT-AI-26-011 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Continuation of Modifications to Peer Review Practices
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-069 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Podcast: The future of quantum computing
item.description: The future of quantum information science and engineering promises computers with unprecedented speed and capabilities. Mikhail Lukin, an NSF-supported professor, discusses his work...

item.title: So, I’m Interested in a Highlighted Topic…What Do I Do Now?
item.description: In short, Highlighted Topics are a way to understand NIH priorities and start a conversation. it is important to note though that NIH Institutes, Centers, and Offices (ICOs) continue to fund a wide range of high-quality research beyond areas identified as a Highlighted Topic.

item.title: For quantum computing, different qubits are better together
item.description: HARQ program launches to move quantum computing beyond single-qubit systems.

item.title: NSF announces 2026 Graduate Research Fellowship Program award offers
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation (NSF) today announced that it has made offers and will award 2,500 Graduate Research Fellowships for the 2026-2027 academic year...

item.title: Notice of Change to Research Support and Salary Restrictions in PAR-25-251, NIAID Career Transition Award (K22 Independent Clinical Trial Not Allowed)
item.description: Notice NOT-AI-26-001 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts
